text.title: Gemini API Integration Failure Modes
text.summary: Five recurring failure modes in Gemini integrations.

antipattern.description: Inline base64 for large media (>10 MB).
antipattern.symptom: Request size exceeds limit; intermittent 400 errors on long videos.
antipattern.root-cause: Default code path uses inline data; Files API not wired.
antipattern.fix: Use Files API for >10 MB or any video/audio; track TTL (rule r2).

antipattern.symptom: BLOCK_REASON surfaces in production unexpectedly when SDK default changes.
antipattern.root-cause: Implicit default trusted to "do the right thing".
antipattern.fix: Explicit 4-category settings with chosen thresholds (rule r4).

antipattern.description: BLOCK_REASON swallowed — code returns empty string when finish_reason != STOP.
antipattern.symptom: Users see empty responses; support cannot diagnose because reason not logged.
antipattern.fix: Surface finish_reason + block_reason in the response handler (rule r6).

antipattern.description: No retry on 429 — single rate-limit kills the call.
Model mix on the same call site — Pro and Flash alternating.
antipattern.symptom: Quality and cost both swing day-to-day; eval results inconsistent.
antipattern.root-cause: Routing logic accidentally added without per-site grid.
antipattern.fix: One model per call site; use the latency-vs-quality grid to lock it in.
